case_title: 1633 BROADWAY, LLC VS. BROBECK, PHLEGER & HARRISON, LLP

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY FILED BY COUNSEL FOR TRUSTEE FOR BROBECK PHLEGER & HARRISON LLP

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1633 BROADWAY, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROBECK, PHLEGER & HARRISON, LLP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1633 BROADWAY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROBECK, PHLEGER & HARRISON, LLP $384,163.91 PRINCIPAL, $13,356.27 INTEREST, $224.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $397,744.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
